stemHtml: If a straight line is drawn on an aeronautical chart between any two positions, what will determine the true track change along that line between the two positions?

options.a: The chart convergence between the two meridians.
options.b: The Earth convergence between the two meridians and the sine of the mean latitude.
options.c: The Earth convergence between the two meridians.
options.d: The chart convergence between the two meridians and the sine of the parallel of origin.
